news.title: India shields pre-2017 foreign investment gains from strict tax rules
news.india_relevance: Provides critical tax certainty for private equity and venture capital firms operating in India.
news.why_it_matters:
By exempting older gains from GAAR, the government prevents retrospective tax litigation and maintains investor confidence.
It resolves a major friction point for global funds that entered India before the current tax regime.

news.title: Overseas Investment – Submission of References to the Reserve Bank
news.india_relevance: Direct regulatory instruction from the central bank governing how Indian entities invest abroad.

news.title: Bank CD ratio hits record high of 83% as credit growth outpaces deposits
news.india_relevance: Highlights a systemic liquidity strain in the Indian banking sector.
news.why_it_matters:
A high credit-to-deposit ratio suggests banks are running out of low-cost funds to lend, potentially forcing higher deposit rates.
This structural imbalance could lead to a slowdown in credit availability for the broader economy.

news.title: China pulls ahead in biologics race, forcing Indian drugmakers to rethink strategy
news.india_relevance: Concerns the future competitiveness of India's 'pharmacy of the world' status.
news.why_it_matters:
Indian pharma has traditionally dominated generics, but the shift toward complex biologics is a high-stakes transition.

news.title: How Russian oil makes its way to India—two key routes, a backup & a sanctions hack
